message:
fix: replace asupersync path dep with crates.io version (fixes #42)

This allows frankensqlite to be consumed as a Cargo git dependency
without requiring the asupersync repo to be cloned alongside it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -105,6 +105,8 @@ checksum = "7c02d123df017efcdfbd739ef81735b36c5ba83ec3c59c80a9d7ecc718f92e50"
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
 version = "0.2.9"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "0348801439f904e16ef77c54e0ea053e3821a52d8875a77b3d4ac803ad8d0662"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode-next",
@@ -721,6 +723,8 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
 version = "0.2.9"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "b33fa1070b94d690c87242247a8e402afbbf983b3f770d5ef45f61fb600f6349"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -730,6 +734,8 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
 version = "0.2.9"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "055cfe4bb1cc6706adf273e41d75d941b10be8ada0ff4ae5f2f564d91cf24a90"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
@@ -738,6 +744,8 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
 version = "0.2.9"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "6d5127a59ac195a757e4fdad400ad808528e9b435d1188ef22e8ae079c868114"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
 ]
